achievements.description: GDCU-8870 [GDC][DEV] Investigate Performance Improvements for Page Timeouts — marked Done by Nebojsa Stanic. Resolved frequent publish timeouts across 8 critical US pages in MrCurl (us/online-casinos, us/online-poker/wsop, us/sportsbooks/hard-rock-bet, and others). Unblocks Genesis team workflow.

GDCU-8871 🔥 [GDC][DEV] Free to Play App POC v2 — marked Done by Carlos Blauth. Delivered: larger Cosmo Spins card with prize details text, sticky bottom nav (Games / Account / Gambling.com), offer tiles interleaved in slot game carousel every 2 games, popup offer banner moved to game detail screen, removed 10 non-logged game limit.

Ciara Carroll published a comprehensive Claude Design usage guide to #gdc-pod and #core-product (15:49 BST). Covers what Claude Design is, team etiquette for all roles, how GDC's 3,000-component design system was built, a password-protected preview URL, and recommended workflows for PMs, devs, and designers.
Learning Hub launched with the weekly release — confirmed by Gabriel Cornoiu in #gdc-pod (09:39 BST): 'The Learning Hub goes live with our weekly release.'

GDCU-8893 [GDC][UX] Gambling.com Design System — advanced from In Progress to In Product (Ciara Carroll). The GDC Claude Design system with 3,000+ components, elements, icons, and images is ready for product review and potential closure. Chloe Christie queried closure in #gdc-product-design-pod this morning.

GDCU-8813 [GDC][UX] Audit Ace Navigation Assistant UI — moved to In Product by Miguel Migneco today. Audit of Ace navigation assistant for UI redundancy following the global nav bar implementation is ready for Mike's review.
GDCU-8895 [GDC][DEV][US] Prediction Market Page Not Appearing on US Sitemap — moved to In QA by Sanja Budic today. US sitemap issue for prediction market pages now in QA validation.
GDCU-8900 🔥 [GDC][DEV] SlotsLaunch Game Grid Shortcode — moved to In QA by Kelvin Yee today. High-priority game grid shortcode for SlotsLaunch now in QA.

GDCU-8878 [GDC][DEV][CA/FR] Implement Oplist Redesign on Online Casinos Page — Kelvin Yee moved to In Progress today. CA/FR casino page oplist redesign implementation is now underway, building on Ciara's designs shared to #gdc-product-led-growth on 28 April.
Mike created a Claude Design prompt log on Confluence for the product design pod to capture iterative prompts used in claude.ai/design, enabling cross-team visibility of design workflow patterns.

QA Playwright automation framework documentation expanded: Robin John updated the Gambling.com Test Automation setup/progress page; Shane McGrath added coverage documentation for Slots Games Widget (UK) and Category Landing Pages (UK & DE) in the GDC Core Confluence space.
Sprint Retro held today — Chloe Christie reminded the team to add points via Retrium at 14:31 BST, covering end-of-sprint reflections for GDCU Sprint 8.

meeting_summaries.title: Mid Week Catchup — 29th April 2026
meeting_summaries.time: 29/04/2026 — exact time unrecorded; agenda page created/last modified ~10am BST
meeting_summaries.summary: Weekly mid-sprint sync covering release readiness, UX ticket status, and tooling decisions. Key topics: Author Carousel shortcode reuse for Experts Carousel (Joshua/GDCU-8880), Genesis Content Layouts (GDCU-8842) layout cleared for go-live, F2P App POC v2 (GDCU-8871) closed as Done, Cool Tones fixes (GDCU-8834) carried over, Ace assistant design readiness queried, clarification needed on what is missing from Betting Tips Hub (GDCU-8512), Ciara providing feedback on Learning Hub imagery (GDCU-8736), and Ciara sharing Claude Design guidelines team-wide today. Action items were not fully populated in Confluence at time of generation.
decisions: GDCU-8871 Free to Play App POC v2 — closed/Done, confirmed in meeting.
GDCU-8842 Genesis Content Layouts — Chloe confirmed layout cleared for go-live.
GDCU-8834 Cool Tones — carried over to next sprint; not making this release.
GDCU-8893 Design System — Chloe queried whether this can be closed now. Requires Mike's sign-off to progress.
Ciara to share Claude Design guidelines widely today (completed — posted to #gdc-pod and #core-product at 15:49 BST).
Cameron Bremner's duplicate of the GDC Claude Design system to be removed to avoid confusion.
action_items_from_meeting: Mike to confirm what is missing from GDCU-8512 Betting Tips Hub and align with Miguel or Ciara on resolution.
Mike to sign off or close GDCU-8893 Design System.
Chloe to create dev ticket for pros and cons component update (confirmed in #gdc-product-design-pod).
Chloe/Joshua to raise ticket for CTA alignment issue on gambling.com/uk/online-casinos/strategy/the-6-highest-paying page (flagged by Mike in #gdc-product-design-pod at 10:44 BST).
Joshua Smith to confirm closure of GDCU-8737 in favour of GDCU-8685 Search & Filter Components Audit next sprint.
Ciara to speak to Dean and Brand about their Claude Design requirements.

meeting_summaries.title: Sprint Retro — GDCU Sprint 8
meeting_summaries.summary: End-of-sprint retrospective held via Retrium (external tool). Chloe Christie prompted team to add points at 14:31 BST. No notes captured in Confluence. Regression testing for Sprint 8 (GDCU-8867) is In QA with Robin John.

action_points.action: Sign off GDCU-8893 Gambling.com Design System (Ciara Carroll, Highest). Moved to In Product today — the full 3,000-component GDC Claude Design system is ready for review. Chloe Christie explicitly asked 'Are we happy to close the design system ticket?' in #gdc-product-design-pod (09:53 BST). This is now day 13+. Review and confirm closure or provide feedback.

Unblock GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign (Ciara Carroll, Blocked). Day 10 blocked and In Product — the longest-running active blocker in the sprint. No new Jira or Slack activity from Ciara on this today. Resolve at start of tomorrow or it carries into a third sprint.

Review and sign off GDCU-8869 Desktop PSI geo-redirect race condition bug (Sanja Budic, High). In Product since 28 April at 12:48. PSI desktop audits are broken across 78+ URLs in all markets due to a race condition on DOMContentLoaded. Fix options are fully documented in the ticket. No movement today.

Escalate GDCU-8792 Cloudflare Bot Management blocker (Sanja Budic, Blocked in QA). Still blocked — no status change today. Sanja has two concurrent PM-attention items (GDCU-8869 In Product + GDCU-8792 Blocked in QA). Assess whether escalation to Eoin or engineering leads is needed.

Review and sign off GDCU-8813 Audit Ace Navigation Assistant UI (Miguel Migneco, Medium). NEW today — moved to In Product. Audit reviews Ace navigation for redundancy following global nav bar implementation. Mike is stakeholder; sign-off required.

Clarify what is missing from GDCU-8512 Always On Betting Tips Hub (Miguel Migneco, Medium). Raised in today's Mid Week Catchup by Ciara: 'Can we clarify what is missing from the GDCU-8512 Betting Tips Hub?' Still In Product since 23 April. Provide requirements clarification so UX can close or iterate.

Review and sign off GDCU-8862 Offer Terms Static/Scrollable (Kelvin Yee, Medium). In Product since 28 April. Bet365 compliance requirement for per-brand static/scrollable T&C logic across all UK operator lists. Mike is a named stakeholder.

Review and sign off GDCU-8736 Learning Hub imagery (Ciara Carroll, Medium). Now In Product. Ciara mentioned additional feedback on the images in today's mid-week catchup and will share updated guidelines. Review once Ciara's final version is shared.

Review and sign off GDCU-8801 Oplist Redesign on CA/FR Casino Page (Ciara Carroll, Medium). In Product since 16 April — Day 10. Ciara shared updated Figma designs to #gdc-product-led-growth on 28 April. Review the Figma link and sign off.

Review and sign off GDCU-8694 Image Carousel 500x290 (Jessica Dordevic, Medium). In Product since 28 April. Adds 500x290 size option to the image carousel shortcode for all geos. Mike is a named stakeholder.

Reply to Chloe Christie in Group DM (Mike / Chloe / Gab) re: stakeholder intake form — she asked to add a schema sub-section to the SEO field and a new page option with a dropdown for editable content blocks (23 April 15:26 BST). No Slack activity from Chloe on this today.

Reply to Gabriel Cornoiu in Group DM re: stakeholder intake form — two open questions: (1) should there be an 'Other' option in the offer ordering dropdown? (2) does 'new ordering structure required' mean a new OpList? No new activity today.

Confirm closure of GDCU-8737 Slot Game Hub Filter Refinements. Joshua Smith proposed closing in #gdc-product-design-pod (10:49 BST) in favour of the broader GDCU-8685 Search & Filter Components Audit planned for next sprint. Ticket already moved to Backlog/Unassigned in Jira today. Confirm agreement.
Follow up on IUJ user tally request — Mike asked in #gdc-pod (24 April) for count of users within 50 chips of levelling up (200–250 range). No visible response in channel.

GDCU-8903 Sports Quiz Hub (Backlog) — create the UX pre-requisite ticket or validate scope alignment with Chloe and Gab. Ticket states the UX design handoff must be completed before this ticket is actioned. No new activity today.

calendar._note: Microsoft 365 authentication not completed — Outlook calendar unavailable for 30/04/2026. No Confluence agenda pages have been created yet for 30 April 2026 in the GDCC space. Based on the recurring meeting pattern: SMT Tuesday (Tuesdays), Mid Week Catchup (Wednesdays — held today), Product Sync (fortnightly Wednesdays). Thursdays are typically lighter on recurring meetings but may have one-off syncs. Provide the OAuth callback URL to enable calendar access for future reports.
